TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mkibuhw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang mkibuhw. 160 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 450 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 267 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 30%, Amis 6%, Tayal 3%, Puyuma 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = mkibuħw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ mkibuħw. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, pujuma *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Mkibuhw = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang mkibuhw. 160 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 450 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 41% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 59% niqan 267 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 30%, Amis 6%, Tayal 3%, Puyuma 1%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = mkibuħw = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ mkibuħw. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, pujuma *%. pnjaħan pnatas
